craigslist.title: Balcony, 24/7 Emergency Maintenance, Additional Storage
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 180 Woodbury St, Manchester, NH 03102 Welcome to our stunning one and two-bedroom apartments for rent in Manchester, NH. Ideally located at the nexus of Woodbury and Second Street, Carisbrooke at Manchester Apartments is a veritable oasis of urban luxury and comfort. Outfitted with modern amenities, smartly-designed open floor plans, and all the perks one needs for a relaxed lifestyle, our pet-friendly community is one of the best places in Manchester to call your own. Having easy access to I-93, Route 3, and Route 293, Carisbrooke Apartments is near attractions of all kinds. We are also within walking distance from Downtown and only three miles away from Elliot Hospital, as well as other popular places like the New Hampshire Mall or the NH Fisher Cats Stadium. Our incredible location is only the beginning, as our luxury apartments for rent also offer no less than 15 distinct layouts for you to choose from. Ranging in size from 740 to 1,390sqft, our spacious floor plans make it easy for you to find the perfect home. The amenities we offer complete your lifestyle and ensure that all your needs are taken care of. Fido will love the finely landscaped grounds, and you’ll find it impossible not to like having a fitness center and community lounge here at our community. Go ahead! Browse our photo gallery, watch our presentation video, then give us a call – we have so much more to show you! Come live the life you want and join us at Carisbrooke Apartments in Manchester, NH! Features Include: Gas Heat included in select apartments Fully Renovated with Stainless Steel Package Cable Ready Plank Flooring Fitness Center Spacious Walk-in Closets Garage Online Payments Available Central AC/Heat Carpeted Bedrooms 24/7 Emergency Maintenance Open Floor Plan Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livebriarcliffmgmt.com/ti3ihexa/carisbrooke-apartments We are currently offering 12-month lease terms at this time. *Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information.
